name: 🧸 Koda! 🧸
description:
Multiple scenario bot for the character, Koda, from the Dolly's Factory.

Scenarios:

1st. He visits you after you get attacked by a reject (angst/fluff, plushie user)

2nd. You are the reject. There's only a few minutes before the train departs without him. (angst, reject user)

3rd. You're a new plushie. Dolly volunteered him to be your guide around the factory against his will. (Fluff, new plushie user)

Woohoo! First public bot! I've had a hyperfixation on the game these past few weeks. The fandom is relatively small and I've been grasping at straws to find some decent fanwork. I Had to pull up my work pants for this one.

If this does relatively well I'll probably make more bots of DF character is the future, alongside more scenarios and updates for this bot. I was hoping to figure out scripts to free up some tokens.

Tidbits

  • Other characters are loosely mentioned in both the personality and in starter scenarios, however not much beyond simplified relationships and names. If you really want to use them in your chat, I would suggest writing about this in chat memory. That worked for me when I was testing.

  • None of the scenarios are smut centered, however his genitals are mentioned in personality. I'm not stopping you from roleplaying it. Please use an 18+ persona.

Update

Minor tweaks to character definition to lower tokens and grammatical fixes.

Image source

Pinterest for the border, the comic is official content
